description_long: This is a large, modern sectional sofa with a clean, boxy silhouette and a left-facing chaise lounge extension. The sofa features broad, rectangular seat and back cushions that appear thick and plush, providing ample comfort. The backrest is continuous and slightly angled, with two prominent back cushions and a third, smaller cushion on the chaise section. The armrests are wide, flat, and padded, matching the height of the backrest for a cohesive look. The sofa sits on short, block-style legs that are only slightly visible, giving it a low-profile stance. The upholstery is smooth and uniform, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching, and the overall color is a neutral gray.
description: A large, modern gray sectional sofa with a left-facing chaise, broad cushions, and wide, padded armrests. The design is clean and boxy with smooth, uniform upholstery.
description_view_0: Side view highlighting the left-facing chaise lounge and the wide, padded armrest at the end.
description_view_1: Rear view showing the continuous backrest and the alignment of the back cushions along the length of the sofa.
description_view_2: Opposite side view focusing on the main seating section and the right armrest, with the chaise extending away.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the full seating area, arrangement of seat and back cushions, and both armrests.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large seat cushions and three back cushions, all rectangular and uniform in size, with the back cushions attached and aligned with the seat sections; sectional layout with a chaise extension.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, flat, and padded armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest, with a straight, boxy profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, minimally visible, likely made of wood or metal, with a recessed placement for a low-profile appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, medium-height backrest with a straight profile, featuring three attached rectangular back cushions and no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth upholstery with no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching; the surface appears uniform and matte.
